pi_items.source: setup_task.sh writes the specification to this exact path.
setup_task.sh specification text and verifier.py logic explicitly enforce this exact title.
setup_task.sh specification asks for 'Q&A' or 'Questions', and verifier.py strictly checks for the presence of these keywords.
setup_task.sh specification and verifier.py logic explicitly limit the presentation to a maximum of 12 slides.
setup_task.sh specification and verifier.py logic expect the final presentation to be saved at this path.
task.json, setup_task.sh, and setup_wps.sh specify this as the path to the original presentation.
Unzipping and counting slide xml files (ppt/slides/slide*.xml) from the downloaded Apache POI test data (2411-Performance_Up.pptx) confirms exactly 48 slides.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses a real 48-slide presentation (Apache HTTP Server performance analysis) sourced from the Apache POI test suite. The agent is required to condense this into a new presentation saved at '/home/ga/Documents/executive_briefing.pptx' with a maximum of 12 slides. The new presentation must feature the exact title 'Apache Infrastructure: Q4 2024 Executive Briefing' on the first slide and include the keyword 'Q&A' or 'Questions' on the last slide.
